description: Structural probe corpus for complex English. target_frame lists required English slot heads (not exact fon). Probes with status pass gate CI via --assert; broken probes track known gaps.

phrases.en: I want to go to the city but I am afraid of the dark.
phrases.note: but-clause split; want omitted per golden L13 (no obligation grammar)

phrases.en: They ran toward us from the river.
The hunter followed the animal into the forest.
Are you going to the market tomorrow?
phrases.note: question subject preserved; tomorrow trailing time

phrases.en: The child ran away when the dog barked.
Go away and leave me alone.
Come here quickly.
We should not go there at night.
I am going to tell you a story about the old king.
The bird flew over the lake and landed near the trees.
Bring the water from the spring to the camp.
phrases.note: bring not in lexicon; dual paths incomplete

phrases.en: He said he would return home after the sun set.
I have never been to the city before.
When she arrives, we will leave for the mountains.
I go to the city.
I want to eat seafood.
I want to eat sea food.
phrases.note: sea food token merge converges with seafood

phrases.en: seafood
phrases.note: word mode; must not collapse to eat

phrases.en: I want to sleep.
phrases.note: desire+infinitive: event desire + object infinitive verb

phrases.en: Do not eat the fish.
phrases.note: imperative negation; fish must not hypernym-collapse to eat

phrases.en: The fish swims in the river.
phrases.note: fish in subject slot must stay fish, not eat

phrases.en: I am afraid of the dark.
Nobody went home after dark.
Tell the child a story about the sea.
We ran through the forest toward the river.
phrases.note: through path + toward path on same motion frame

phrases.en: Bring me water.
phrases.note: bring resolves via la; water object present
